name: David Bowie
title: Last known photo of David Bowie, captured as he left the New York Theatre Workshop on December 7, 2015, after the opening-night premiere of his musical Lazarus — his final public appearance.
description: The last known photo of David Bowie is of him leaving the opening-night premiere of his off-Broadway musical Lazarus on December 7, 2015, at the New York Theatre Workshop in the East Village. Earlier that evening he had arrived with his wife Iman and joined the cast on stage for the final bow. Based on analysis of the people visible alongside him — matched against video of his departure that evening — this image appears to be the last photograph taken of him. It was his final public appearance. Bowie had been privately battling liver cancer for roughly 18 months — a diagnosis he kept from all but his closest circle, as detailed in a 2017 BBC documentary. A month later, on January 8, 2016, he released his 25th studio album Blackstar on his 69th birthday. He died two days later, on January 10, 2016, at his apartment in Manhattan.

lyrics.text:
Fame makes a man take things over
Fame lets him loose, hard to swallow
Fame puts you there where things are hollow
Fame

bio: David Bowie (born David Robert Jones) was an English singer, songwriter, and actor. Across five decades he reinvented popular music through a succession of alter egos — Ziggy Stardust, the Thin White Duke, Aladdin Sane — and released influential albums spanning glam rock, art rock, soul, and electronic music. He was also a celebrated film actor (The Man Who Fell to Earth, Labyrinth) and visual artist.

location.name: New York Theatre Workshop, 79 E 4th St, New York, NY 10003
